run_summary.summary: Covered April 18–22 email activity (main branch was last updated Apr 17). Found 4 actionable items: Flexsteel is actively in progress on the Popfly platform with a retail store visit TOMORROW (Thursday Apr 23 at 11:30am at Steinhafels) — Kenny just confirmed with Ian. Aleve has been sitting on revision feedback since Apr 13 that Liz just discovered today — she needs to redo the voiceover and add disclaimers ASAP. JLab's March Campaign payment ($2k) is overdue as of Apr 20, with Mariah chasing JLab accounting today. And Linkind is a new deal — product arrived Apr 20, and the manager cleared Liz to film and submit for review.

suggestions.message: Store visit at Steinhafels is TOMORROW (Thursday Apr 23) at 11:30am! Ian fixed the Popfly campaign application issue — Kenny needs to re-apply on the platform TODAY before the visit. Don't walk in without it done. 🏪

Aleve's revision feedback was sent Apr 13 and Liz just found out today (Apr 21). They want the voiceover redone to match their script + required disclaimers added. Already 8 days late — needs same-day attention. Script: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Y9GTFoO9pVS5c9oarq00onyFvIv_hXb4 📋
March Campaign payment ($2,000) was due Apr 20 and still hasn't landed. Mariah is chasing JLab accounting — she expected an update today (Apr 22). Check in with her if you haven't heard. 💸
Bark payment ($750) is due Apr 24 — two days away. As of Apr 10 it wasn't paid yet. Worth a quick check with Mariah to confirm it's on track. 🐾
First draft deadline for SOJOS is TOMORROW, Apr 23 — Kenny negotiated this hard deadline with Ruby. Make sure Liz is on track! 🎬

deals.next_action: Re-apply on Popfly platform (Ian fixed the issue) — then prep for store visit Thursday Apr 23 at 11:30am

Asked Kenny to retry applying. Kenny also confirmed retail store visit Thursday Apr 23 at 11:30am–12pm at Steinhafels (which carries Flexsteel — store was notified to expect them). Campaign is for Flexsteel & Steinhafels jointly.
